title: Rebuild of Evangelion 20 Speculation
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion 2.0 Speculation (Some SPOILERS!) Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:36 pm Okay, so some fellow EGFers and I have been discussing things in #egf-rebuild about the film. A 4chan thread has this image, which supposedly deals with the cover to the soon to be released Eva Extra issue 04. Warning text says: "Do not open this until you've seen the movie." Alt image, thanks to AchtungAffen for the pic: Speculation has been that the image in question (which is strikingly similar to the scene in EoE of Spear of Longinus right against Eva-01's neck) is either Lilith's original Spear, if in Central Dogma, Lilith is speared with Adam's spear, or something that's from the FAR. Of course, this is what 4chan is saying so I'm not sure what the Japanese fans thing. Or that maybe it's an Ax of Longinus?? Speaking of which, 2chan.net has this thread about 2.0 impressions that keep on saying something about "not official" images (with a link to that image collage from that one 2.0 trailer), whatever the hell THAT means. Discuss.

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:41 pm I wonder what the text under "Warning" says. Maybe someday we'll find out.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:42 pm It says "Do not open this until you have seen the movie", as I mentioned in my previous post.

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:42 pm I saw the first draft of the post without the extra pic. That's why I was wondering.

[]: Post by pablumatic » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:01 pm The real Unit-01 disguised as Unit-06 comes down from the moon and kills the imposter finally revealing the series as a sequel? (I'm kidding) I'd like to know exactly what is is, and I'm sure we'll hear more within a few hours.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:24 pm Ahahahaha oh wow. 4chan and 2chan are going ballistic with this shit about 2.0. Of course, trolls on either side abound, saying things like: Asuka dies or Kaworu and Asuka have sex or Although.... Possible spoilers, THIS IS RUMOR MILL  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:29 pm I can buy both those spoilers. The first should've happened in the TV show in the first place and the second makes for dramatic storytelling and only will make the long wait for 3.0 even more unbearable.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:32 pm Also, supposedly: Code: Select all <AchtungAffen> wow, they go to a restoration institute of the sea, to turn it blue again

[]: Post by Baz » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:33 pm If we get the cliffhanger ending and then 3.0 starts up with Yui safely back in the cage, then I'll leave Eva fandom and never return.

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:35 pm Still this is interesting i can't wait. So Toji's dead ...i was afraid of that.

[]: Post by schismatics » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:37 pm *running around in circles* can't wait can't can't wait

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:37 pm It's just a rumor for now, so take EVERYTHING that you see until Ornette says otherwise with a HUGE grain of salt.

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:43 pm Translations suggest that Toji goes to see his sister instead of piloting Eva-03, forcing Asuka to be the tester. She gets mental contamination (perhaps this Rebuild's mindrape sequence from Episode 22? no evidence) and Eva-01/Shinji act like they do in Episode 18. After the battle, Asuka is put in isolation.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:45 pm Mental contamination? Don't tell me that Werewolf Asuka is in Rebuild?

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:46 pm ^ Oh if that were to be the case then I'd be a happy man. It would mean Anno fully understands we know this shit back and front and that he's really gonna push the boundaries to make us feel REAL emotions again!

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:49 pm The 4chan thread just gave me a headache. Ornette will be here soon.

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:49 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Mental contamination?

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:53 pm So there's still a chance of Asuka being mind-raped. IF the translation's are true.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:54 pm That 4chan board is crazy. All you can read is lots of OMG and FAG and other stupid insults. Though I did read that Mari's introduction is Shinji's on the school roof and she parachutes down. If that were to happen not only will I laugh tears of awesomeness but Eva will finally have a character who is through and through COOL.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:54 pm I know that the term comes from the original series, but in the really old scripts for NGE, Asuka and the rest of the world suffer "mental contamination" and turn into werewolves. That's what it reminded me of- and I'm being serious about the werewolf part.
